<a id="class-openxrextensionwrapperextension"></a>

# OpenXRExtensionWrapperExtension

**Deprecated:** Use [OpenXRExtensionWrapper](class_openxrextensionwrapper.md#class-openxrextensionwrapper) instead.

**Inherits:** [OpenXRExtensionWrapper](class_openxrextensionwrapper.md#class-openxrextensionwrapper) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Allows implementing OpenXR extensions with GDExtension.

## Description

**OpenXRExtensionWrapperExtension** allows implementing OpenXR extensions with GDExtension. The extension should be registered with [OpenXRExtensionWrapper.register_extension_wrapper()](class_openxrextensionwrapper.md#class-openxrextensionwrapper-method-register-extension-wrapper).
